feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,663Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 57

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,106Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Relationships are hard. They’re even harder when both you and Jason Todd are dealing with things you both refuse to talk about.

entry.title: Code Red
entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,736Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Flatmates can be a real gamble. Sometimes they're normal. Sometimes they wear masks and wield guns. You move to Gotham to start at a new job at the General Hospital, but with limited options you have to move into a sketchy apartment.

entry.title: Red Web
entry.summary:
Author: himekaida (AshTree95)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,344Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 54

Summary: Your world crumbles the moment you’re freed from General Dreykov’s control. Thrown across dimensions and stripped of everything familiar, you land in Gotham with one goal: survive. You build something fragile in the chaos—a system, a routine, a web that keeps you alive. Then Red Hood tears straight through it. And suddenly, survival isn’t the only thing at stake. You start as a problem. You become something he can’t ignore.

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,260Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 12

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.title: find me faceless
entry.summary:
Author: PunsandPoses

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,260Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 2,834

Summary: It wasn't like you were stupid. No, you dotted your i's and crossed your t's and did all the shit that a citizen of a shit hole like Gotham City did. You carried a taser, kept out of alleys, travelled with a companion.And it had kept you (relatively) untraumatized for the entirety of the 21 years of your existence. Sure, you'd seen some gruesome things, but that was normal. You weren't the type that made a stupid decision and got screwed over. You were smart.Of course, that flew out the window with the goddamn Red Hood of all people. You had to be stupid with him.[Note: if marked complete, may add chapters later but it's not necessary for the plot.]

entry.title: No Overnight Visitors
entry.summary:
Author: rainydaygotham

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,913Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: No matter what Jason says, the corner store was literally only a block away and not that dangerous of a walk at all. Yeah, this is Crime Alley, but we’re not gonna fucking pretend like your probability of being shanked, shot, or fear gassed goes down in the slightest during the daylight hours versus at night. If Gotham thinks it’s your time, then it’s your time. Doesn’t matter when or where. You just have to accept that.None of those excuses are going to work when your boyfriend catches you coming home at 2am.(Or: You get your period early and Jason takes care of you)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Jason Todd/Reader

entry.summary:
Author: Writingall

entry.title: Pulled Apart.
entry.summary:
Author: MysticMaid

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,391Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: In which Theresa (you) is a therapist at Grady Memorial Psychiatric Hospital by day and an exotic dancer at a club on the south side of Gotham by night. Theresa (you) is running from a past full of debt that seems to keep catching up to her, how will she handle hiding her true identity and balance her new patient at work that seems to want nothing to do with her? … Jason Todd poses as billionaire Bruce Wayne’s son while living a life of secret in the shadows of Gotham as the vigilante Red Hood. Jason Todd is living with PTSD after dying then being resurrected. Jason Todd assaults a police officer during an episode of his and has to attend court-ordered therapy sessions with a therapist (you) that bores him to death.

entry.title: The Bloom Knot
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,951Chapters: 15/30Kudos: 171

Summary: It took one accidental shove and a falling pitcher of orange juice on his twenty-sixth birthday for Jason Peter Todd to finally soul bond with a person. Everything seemed brighter, clearer whenever you were around. Only, there were three massive problems. One, you were his student for the semester. Add the fact that you were now roommates with Damian, which conplicated things a lot. Two, being apart causes actual physical side effects. Any plans involving ignoring each other was not going to work. Three, was the existence of a certain Conner Luthor-Kent in your life. So the only logical thing to do was keep you at arms length while finding a way to break the bond. But between late night motorcycle rides, and accidental library dates against your better judgement, suddenly the both of you weren’t so sure where the line between acquiantances ended and soulmates began.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Baby’s First Creature-Feature
entry.summary:
Author: TheGoldenPath

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,558Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 101

Summary: Excerpt~She’s reading to him, a generator manual that looks well read. The pages are yellow and water stained around her long fingers. His vision lazily trails from the book to his bloodied sheets and back to the stranger. Is he hallucinating a comforting presence to make his reality less burdensome? When had his visions ever been pleasant?A pretty girl to sit by his bedside and comfort him in his death. He tries to reach out and touch her hand, just to see if she’s a fantasy meant to remind him of everything he never fully had only for the pain to jolt up his entire abdomen. Summary~Jason awakes on an alternate earth whose only occupants is a secretive girl and a strange dog. He struggles to bring them home as a presence works in the shadows to control them. He learns the hard way that some secrets are best left alone. Dedicated to all the fawns that had to grow sharp teeth so they could defend themselves❤️

entry.title: Everything is Coming up Roses
entry.summary:
Author: batwngz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,954Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: "Gotham in the spring was, oddly, much too bright. Outside of those stretches of greying rain and thunderous downpour, there were pockets of blinding light that ushered massive crowds into the day-lit streets of the city. There were more people laughing and talking and singing loudly in the presence of their companions, there were more cars honking as they sped through the streets, there were more bodies passing by one another as they maneuvered through the now crowded streets—more sound, more movement, more life. And Jason, of course, hated it." - in which you invited Jason out to a cafe to try some new desserts, but end up surprising him with an unexpected springtime gift.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
